message:
feat: tile focus indicator and stale container fix (#69)

- Add focusedTileId state tracking which tile has keyboard focus
- Focused tile shows blue header bar with white text
- Focused tile has blue border with glow effect
- Corresponding tab in tab bar highlighted with blue underline
- Click a tile to focus it and direct keyboard input there
- Fix stale container tracking: check actual DOM parentElement
  instead of bookkeeping (inst.container) to prevent intermittent
  mount failures after multiple tile toggles

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
